Name: update_departments
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "public"."departments" SET "budget" = "budget" + $1::numeric WHERE departments."id" = $2::uuid AND (departments."id" = ANY($3::uuid[])) RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."budget" AS "budget" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
